pr.title: Make HiFi-GAN ONNX mel contract and tensor layout explicit
pr.body:
- [ ] Inspect latest PR commits and affected HiFi-GAN ONNX code paths
- [ ] Run baseline targeted tests/build checks before edits
- [ ] Fix ONNX output sample rate to use model-config mel sample rate
- [ ] Relax batch-layout validation to allow dynamic/unknown batch dims while validating mel axis
- [ ] Run targeted tests for hifigan/mel layout changes
- [ ] Run final validation (code review + CodeQL), then reply to PR comment
pr.author: Copilot
